name: Best Dad Ever Tee
description: Celebrate the best dad in your life this Father's Day with this bold stamp-print tee. Featuring our signature 'Best Dad Ever' design stamped across the back in classic ink-style lettering. A gift he'll actually wear.

name: Faith Tee
description: A women's tee with quiet confidence. The word 'faith.' is stamped on the back in elegant script — a reminder you carry with you everywhere you go.

name: Love Tee
description: Simple, sweet, and made to be worn. This girl's tee features 'love' with a small heart stamped on the front — because some things don't need explaining.
